> **PARTIAL DATA**: only floki + arnold + meh ran memcache mode
> in this pass; nuc was unreachable via direct SSH (Tailscale
> path broken; ProxyJump-via-arnold works but coordinator's
> NUC_DIRECT_SSH path doesn't fall through). Floki produced 0
> successful ops because its dynomited connected to a leftover
> redis container left on port 17100 by the prior redis-mode
> teardown (Bug C). Arnold + meh both succeeded above 98%.
